description_for_human: Find the cheapest AI model for any task. Real-time pricing across 100+ models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and more.
description_for_model: Cost-optimized LLM model recommendation engine. Use this to find the cheapest model that meets task requirements (type, complexity, budget). Tracks real-time pricing across 100+ models, refreshed every 4 hours. Tools: recommend_model (get cheapest model for a task), compare_models (head-to-head with cost projections), get_pricing (raw pricing with filters), check_price_changes (monitor price changes since a date).
